title: Wailesia punctata
taxonomy: Wailesia punctata is a species of slime mold in the family Physaraceae. It belongs to the phylum Myxomycota, which includes all slime molds. Wailesia punctata is classified as a member of the genus Wailesia, which comprises several species of slime molds. The species is further classified as a member of the suborder Physarina, which includes several families of slime molds. At the kingdom level, Wailesia punctata is classified as a member of the kingdom Protista.
